title: Software Developer
exposure_rationale: Large portions of coding, testing, and documentation are highly susceptible to LLM-based automation and augmentation.

title: General Medical Practitioner
exposure_rationale: AI excels at diagnostic assistance and administrative tasks, but core patient interaction and physical examination remain human-centric.

title: Bricklayer
exposure_rationale: High physical dexterity requirements in unstructured, variable outdoor environments provide a strong barrier to automation.

title: Accountant
exposure_rationale: Routine data reconciliation and reporting are being rapidly automated, though high-level tax strategy and human oversight persist.

title: Shop Sales Assistant
exposure_rationale: Affected by e-commerce and self-checkout, but localized physical assistance and theft prevention still require humans.

title: Heavy Truck Driver
exposure_rationale: Long-haul highway driving is a primary target for autonomous systems, though 'last mile' and docking remain complex.

title: Data Entry Clerk
exposure_rationale: Purely digital information processing with low variability; OCR and LLMs can already perform these tasks with high accuracy.

title: Primary School Teacher
exposure_rationale: Social-emotional learning and classroom management are deeply human; AI serves as a curriculum aid rather than a replacement.

title: Kitchen Assistant
exposure_rationale: Manual prep work in cramped, high-speed, variable environments is difficult for robotics to replicate cost-effectively today.

title: Financial Analyst
exposure_rationale: Deeply quantitative digital work product; generative AI is exceptionally good at summarizing reports and processing financial data.
